name: strstr, strstr_off
title: strstr, strstr_off
description: A character may need several bytes depending on the string encoding, e.g. Japanese characters in Windows ANSI (932) encoding or any special characters in UTF-8 encoding. In that case, you should use mbstrstr/mbstrstr_off instead.
return: First position in bytes of s2 in s1, or -1 if s2 is not found in s1.
